# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  department: string;
  status: string;
  age: number;
  createdAt: string;
}

// Helper to build KV keys dynamically from user input
function buildKey(parts: string[]): Deno.KvKey {
  return parts.filter((p) => p !== undefined && p !== null && p !== "");
}

// Seed some sample data for testing
async function seedData() {
  const users: User[] = [
    { id: "1", name: "Alice", email: "alice@example.com", role: "admin", department: "engineering", status: "active", age: 30, createdAt: "2024-01-01" },
    { id: "2", name: "Bob", email: "bob@example.com", role: "user", department: "marketing", status: "active", age: 25, createdAt: "2024-01-15" },
    { id: "3", name: "Charlie", email: "charlie@example.com", role: "user", department: "engineering", status: "inactive", age: 35, createdAt: "2024-02-01" },
    { id: "4", name: "Diana", email: "diana@example.com", role: "moderator", department: "support", status: "active", age: 28, createdAt: "2024-02-15" },
    { id: "5", name: "Eve", email: "eve@example.com", role: "admin", department: "engineering", status: "active", age: 32, createdAt: "2024-03-01" },
  ];

  for (const user of users) {
    const atomic = kv.atomic();
    // Primary key: ['users', userId]
    atomic.set(["users", user.id], user);
    // Secondary indexes for efficient lookups
    atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_role_department", user.role, user.department, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_department_status", user.department, user.status, user.id], user);
    atomic.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user);
    await atomic.commit();
  }
}

// Get a single user by ID
async function getUser(userId: string): Promise<User | null> {
  const key = buildKey(["users", userId]);
  const result = await kv.get<User>(key);
  return result.value;
}

// Search users with flexible filter criteria
async function searchUsers(filters: Record<string, string>): Promise<User[]> {
  const { role, department, status, email, id, name, minAge, maxAge, limit: limitStr, cursor } = filters;
  const limit = limitStr ? parseInt(limitStr, 10) : 100;

  // Direct lookup by email (unique index)
  if (email) {
    const result = await kv.get<User>(["users_by_email", email]);
    return result.value ? [result.value] : [];
  }

  // Direct lookup by ID
  if (id) {
    const result = await kv.get<User>(buildKey(["users", id]));
    return result.value ? [result.value] : [];
  }

  // Use the most specific secondary index available
  let prefix: Deno.KvKey;

  if (role && department) {
    prefix = ["users_by_role_department", role, department];
  } else if (department && status) {
    prefix = ["users_by_department_status", department, status];
  } else if (role) {
    prefix = ["users_by_role", role];
  } else if (department) {
    prefix = ["users_by_department", department];
  } else if (status) {
    prefix = ["users_by_status", status];
  } else {
    prefix = ["users"];
  }

  const listOptions: Deno.KvListOptions = { limit };
  if (cursor) {
    listOptions.cursor = cursor;
  }

  const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix }, listOptions);
  const users: User[] = [];

  for await (const entry of iter) {
    let user = entry.value;
    if (!user || typeof user !== "object" || !("id" in user)) continue;

    // Apply additional filters that aren't covered by the index
    let matches = true;

    if (status && prefix[0] !== "users_by_status" && prefix[0] !== "users_by_department_status") {
      if (user.status !== status) matches = false;
    }

    if (role && prefix[0] !== "users_by_role" && prefix[0] !== "users_by_role_department") {
      if (user.role !== role) matches = false;
    }

    if (department && prefix[0] !== "users_by_department" && prefix[0] !== "users_by_role_department" && prefix[0] !== "users_by_department_status") {
      if (user.department !== department) matches = false;
    }

    if (name) {
      if (!user.name.toLowerCase().includes(name.toLowerCase())) matches = false;
    }

    if (minAge) {
      if (user.age < parseInt(minAge, 10)) matches = false;
    }

    if (maxAge) {
      if (user.age > parseInt(maxAge, 10)) matches = false;
    }

    if (matches) {
      users.push(user);
    }
  }

  return users;
}

// Create or update a user with all indexes
async function upsertUser(user: User): Promise<boolean> {
  // If updating, remove old indexes first
  const existing = await kv.get<User>(["users", user.id]);
  const atomic = kv.atomic();

  if (existing.value) {
    const old = existing.value;
    atomic.delete(["users_by_role", old.role, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_department", old.department, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_status", old.status, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_role_department", old.role, old.department, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_department_status", old.department, old.status, old.id]);
    atomic.delete(["users_by_email", old.email]);
  }

  // Set new data and indexes
  atomic.set(["users", user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_role_department", user.role, user.department, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_department_status", user.department, user.status, user.id], user);
  atomic.set(["users_by_email", user.email], user);

  const result = await atomic.commit();
  return result.ok;
}

// Delete a user and all indexes
async function deleteUser(userId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const existing = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
  if (!existing.value) return false;

  const user = existing.value;
  const atomic = kv.atomic();

  atomic.delete(["users", user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_role", user.role, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_department", user.department, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_status", user.status, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_role_department", user.role, user.department, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_department_status", user.department, user.status, user.id]);
  atomic.delete(["users_by_email", user.email]);

  const result = await atomic.commit();
  return result.ok;
}

// Dynamic key-based lookup: ['users', userId, filterParam]
async function dynamicKeyLookup(segments: string[]): Promise<unknown> {
  // Build key dynamically from URL segments
  const key = buildKey(segments);

  // Try exact match first
  const exact = await kv.get(key);
  if (exact.value) {
    return { type: "exact", key, data: exact.value };
  }

  // Fall back to prefix listing
  const results: { key: Deno.KvKey; value: unknown }[] = [];
  const iter = kv.list({ prefix: key }, { limit: 50 });
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    results.push({ key: [...entry.key], value: entry.value });
  }

  return { type: "prefix", key, count: results.length, data: results };
}

function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
    },
  });
}

function errorResponse(message: string, status = 400): Response {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message }, status);
}

serve(async (req: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  // Handle CORS preflight
  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, {
      headers: {
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
      },
    });
  }

  try {
    // POST /seed - Seed sample data
    if (path === "/seed" && method === "POST") {
      await seedData();
      return jsonResponse({ message: "Sample data seeded successfully" });
    }

    // GET /users/search?role=admin&department=engineering&status=active&name=ali&minAge=20&maxAge=40
    if (path === "/users/search" && method === "GET") {
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
        filters[key] = value;
      }
      const users = await searchUsers(filters);
      return jsonResponse({
        filters,
        count: users.length,
        data: users,
      });
    }

    // GET /users/:id - Get user by ID
    const userByIdMatch = path.match(/^\/users\/([^/]+)$/);
    if (userByIdMatch && method === "GET") {
      const userId = userByIdMatch[1];
      const user = await getUser(userId);
      if (!user) return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      return jsonResponse({ data: user });
    }

    // POST /users - Create a new user
    if (path === "/users" && method === "POST") {
      const body = await req.json();
      const { id, name, email, role, department, status, age } = body;

      if (!id || !name || !email || !role || !department || !status || age === undefined) {
        return errorResponse("Missing required fields: id, name, email, role, department, status, age");
      }

      const user: User = {
        id,
        name,
        email,
        role,
        department,
        status,
        age: Number(age),
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      const ok = await upsertUser(user);
      if (!ok) return errorResponse("Failed to create user", 500);
      return jsonResponse({ message: "User created", data: user }, 201);
    }

    // PUT /users/:id - Update a user
    if (userByIdMatch && method === "PUT") {
      const userId = userByIdMatch[1];
      const existing = await getUser(userId);
      if (!existing) return errorResponse("User not found", 404);

      const body = await req.json();
      const updated: User = {
        ...existing,
        ...body,
        id: userId, // Don't allow changing ID
      };

      const ok = await upsertUser(updated);
      if (!ok) return errorResponse("Failed to update user", 500);
      return jsonResponse({ message: "User updated", data: updated });
    }

    // DELETE /users/:id - Delete a user
    if (userByIdMatch && method === "DELETE") {
      const userId = userByIdMatch[1];
      const ok = await deleteUser(userId);
      if (!ok) return errorResponse("User not found", 404);
      return jsonResponse({ message: "User deleted" });
    }

    // GET /kv/*segments - Dynamic key lookup
    // e.g., /kv/users/1 -> key: ['users', '1']
    // e.g., /kv/users_by_role/admin -> key: ['users_by_role', 'admin']
    const kvMatch = path.match(/^\/kv\/(.+)$/);
    if (kvMatch && method === "GET") {
      const segments = kvMatch[1].split("/").filter(Boolean);
      if (segments.length === 0) {
        return errorResponse("At least one key segment is required");
      }
      const result = await dynamicKeyLookup(segments);
      return jsonResponse(result);
    }

    // GET /indexes - List available search indexes
    if (path === "/indexes" && method === "GET") {
      return jsonResponse({
        indexes: [
          { name: "primary", key: ["users", "{userId}"], description: "Direct user lookup by ID" },
          { name: "by_role", key: ["users_by_role", "{role}", "{userId}"], description: "Users filtered by role" },
          { name: "by_department", key: ["users_by_department", "{department}", "{userId}"], description: "Users filtered by department" },
          { name: "by_status", key: ["users_by_status", "{status}", "{userId}"], description: "Users filtered by status" },
          { name: "by_role_department", key: ["users_by_role_department", "{role}", "{department}", "{userId}"], description: "Users filtered by role and department" },
          { name: "by_department_status", key: ["users_by_department_status", "{department}", "{status}", "{userId}"], description: "Users filtered by department and status" },
          { name: "by_email", key: ["users_by_email", "{email}"], description: "User lookup by email" },
        ],
        searchParams: [
          "id - Direct user ID lookup",
          "email - Direct email lookup",
          "role - Filter by role (admin, user, moderator)",
          "department - Filter by department",
          "status - Filter by status (active, inactive)",
          "name - Partial name match (case-insensitive)",
          "minAge - Minimum age filter",
          "maxAge - Maximum age filter",
          "limit - Max results (default 100)",
          "cursor - Pagination cursor",
        ],
      });
    }

    // GET / - API documentation
    if (path === "/" && method === "GET") {
      return jsonResponse({
        name: "Edge Database API",
        version: "1.0.0",
        description: "Deno Deploy API with Deno KV storage and flexible search",
        endpoints: {
          "POST /seed": "Seed sample data",
          "GET /users/search?...filters": "Search users with flexible filters",
          "GET /users/:id": "Get user by ID",
          "POST /users": "Create a user",
          "PUT /users/:id": "Update a user",
          "DELETE /users/:id": "Delete a user",
          "GET /kv/*segments": "Dynamic KV key lookup (e.g., /kv/users/1)",
          "GET /indexes": "List available search indexes and parameters",
        },
        examples: {
          searchByRole: "/users/search?role=admin",
          searchByDeptAndStatus: "/users/search?department=engineering&status=active",
          searchByName: "/users/search?name=ali",
          searchWithAgeRange: "/users/search?minAge=25&maxAge=35",
          combinedSearch: "/users/search?role=user&department=engineering&minAge=20",
          dynamicKvLookup: "/kv/users_by_role/admin",
        },
      });
    }

    return errorResponse("Not found", 404);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Error:", err);
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Internal server error";
    return errorResponse(message, 500);
  }
}, { port: 8000 });
